message:
feat(term): add TieredScrollbackStatus telemetry snapshot and scrollback row counting

Introduces a flat telemetry struct for tiered scrollback introspection
and corrects in-memory scrollback row counting.

- TieredScrollbackStatus: new struct providing a single-read snapshot
  of all hot/warm/cold tier metrics (line counts, byte totals, spill
  counters, config thresholds) for diagnostics and monitoring
- Screen::in_memory_scrollback_rows(): returns the scrollback line count
  excluding visible viewport rows, giving an accurate count of buffered
  history
- Screen::tiered_scrollback_status(): assembles the TieredScrollbackStatus
  snapshot from config + live tier state in a single consistent read
- Two comprehensive tests: one scrolls a screen and validates tier
  accounting invariants across hot/warm/cold boundaries; another verifies
  erase_scrollback resets all counters while preserving config

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
